reviews.comment:
Ya de noche tuve un problema grande con mi auto volviendo de MdQ y para poder llegar a BsAs los playeros de ahí me dieron una gran mano. Muy buena gente!

(Translated by Google)
At night, I had a big problem with my car on my way back from Madrid, and the beach attendants there helped me a lot to get to Buenos Aires. Very nice people!

reviews.comment:
Los Baños de varones estaban aptos. Pero los de mujeres no.
Los termos de agua a caliente funcionan muy bien!

Es una lástima lo mal educados que son los que atienden el “Kiosko”. Mal trato y nada serviciales… solo pedí un pequeño favor, calentar una mamadera, en un vasito con agua caliente, y respondieron “que no usaban eso” (aunque para hacer café necesitan agua), y que la ficha para agua caliente salía $100.

Por lo menos eso en estos meses de invierno.

(Translated by Google)
The men's restrooms were fine. But the women's weren't.
The hot water dispensers work perfectly!

It's a shame how rude the people who run the "Kiosk" are. They were rude and unhelpful... I only asked for a small favor, to heat a baby bottle in a small cup of hot water, and they replied that they "didn't use that" (even though they need water to make coffee), and that a token for hot water cost $100.

At least that's how it is during these winter months.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKaXJ5bFR3EAE
